allow: Bash(PORT=5000 CLIENT_URL=http://localhost:5173 MONGODB_URI=mongodb://localhost:27017/test JWT_ACCESS_SECRET=x JWT_REFRESH_SECRET=y SMTP_HOST=localhost SMTP_USER=u SMTP_PASS=p node tests/test-phase7-tasks61-63.js)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in {**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}.items\(\) if any\(x in k.lower\(\) for x in ['google','generative','pdfkit','openai','pdf','bull']\)]")

Bash(sed -i -e 's|apiResponse.successResponse\(res, '\\''Task suggestions generated'\\'', doc, 201\)|apiResponse.successResponse\(res, doc, '\\''Task suggestions generated'\\'', 201\)|' -e 's|apiResponse.successResponse\(res, '\\''Suggestion applied — task created'\\'', result\)|apiResponse.successResponse\(res, result, '\\''Suggestion applied — task created'\\''\)|' -e 's|apiResponse.successResponse\(res, '\\''Suggestion dismissed'\\'', doc\)|apiResponse.successResponse\(res, doc, '\\''Suggestion dismissed'\\''\)|' -e 's|apiResponse.successResponse\(res, '\\''Suggestion set deleted'\\''\)|apiResponse.successResponse\(res, { id: req.params.id }, '\\''Suggestion set deleted'\\''\)|' taskSuggestions.controller.js)

Bash(sed -i -e 's|apiResponse.successResponse\(res, '\\''Lead scored successfully'\\'', result\)|apiResponse.successResponse\(res, result, '\\''Lead scored successfully'\\''\)|' -e 's|apiResponse.successResponse\(res, '\\''Lead score retrieved'\\'', lead\)|apiResponse.successResponse\(res, lead, '\\''Lead score retrieved'\\''\)|' -e 's|apiResponse.successResponse\(res, '\\''Batch scoring complete'\\'', result\)|apiResponse.successResponse\(res, result, '\\''Batch scoring complete'\\''\)|' leadScoring.controller.js)

Bash(sed -i -e 's|apiResponse.successResponse\(res, '\\''Meeting created'\\'', meeting, 201\)|apiResponse.successResponse\(res, meeting, '\\''Meeting created'\\'', 201\)|' -e 's|apiResponse.successResponse\(res, '\\''Audio uploaded and queued for transcription'\\'', { jobId }\)|apiResponse.successResponse\(res, { jobId }, '\\''Audio uploaded and queued for transcription'\\''\)|' -e 's|apiResponse.successResponse\(res, '\\''Meeting retrieved'\\'', meeting\)|apiResponse.successResponse\(res, meeting, '\\''Meeting retrieved'\\''\)|' -e 's|apiResponse.successResponse\(res, '\\''Meeting deleted'\\''\)|apiResponse.successResponse\(res, { id: req.params.id }, '\\''Meeting deleted'\\''\)|' meetings.controller.js)
Bash(sed -i "s|successResponse\(res, preset, 'Preset created successfully', {}, 201\)|successResponse\(res, preset, 'Preset created successfully', 201\)|" filterPresets.controller.js)
Bash(sed -i "s|successResponse\(res, reminder, 'Reminder created successfully', {}, 201\)|successResponse\(res, reminder, 'Reminder created successfully', 201\)|" reminders.controller.js)
